use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF REDUCING OFF TIME FROM L-DOPA THERAPY, COMPRISING ADMINISTERING, TO A HUMAN PATIENT WITH PARKINSON'S DISEASE, AN EFFECTIVE AMOUNT OF ISTRADEFYLLINE, WHEREIN THE PATIENT CURRENTLY RECEIVES SAID L-DOPA THERAPY
